goals.notes: First Y-junction; one terminal outlet, one primary continuation.

rejected_draft.rationale: I am completing junction_1 as required, using the branch vector [-1, 0, -1]. To address the previous geometry failures (where the backward-pointing branch collided with the inlet pipe M1), I have minimized the hub and branch length. Using a max_hub_radius of 10.5mm (just 0.5mm beyond the pipe radius) and a short branch length of 11mm, I am reducing the backward projection. Since a junction is structurally required for this goal and must be placed at M1.out, this minimal hub profile is the most feasible configuration to avoid a volume overlap while satisfying the mandatory branch vector contract.
